_meta.description: Advanced condition templates for multi-condition logic, thresholds, state machine conditions, and AI-generated patterns.

threshold_zone.label: Threshold Zone
threshold_zone.description: Entry/exit when metric crosses into a zone and stays for N bars

cross_condition.label: Cross/Crossunder
cross_condition.description: Trigger when metric A crosses above/below metric B (or a price level)

divergence_condition.label: Divergence Condition
divergence_condition.description: Trigger when price and indicator diverge (regular or hidden)

oscillator_zone.label: Oscillator Zone + Exit
oscillator_zone.description: Enter when oscillator enters zone, exit when it leaves

multi_timeframe_condition.label: Multi-Timeframe Condition
multi_timeframe_condition.description: Require the same condition to be true on a higher timeframe

smc_condition.label: SMC Confluence
smc_condition.description: Multiple SMC conditions must align: FVG + OB + Structure

regime_filter.label: Regime Filter
regime_filter.description: Only allow entries when market is in a specific regime

correlation_pair_condition.label: Cross-Asset Condition
correlation_pair_condition.description: Condition based on another symbol's state (correlation, divergence, relative strength)

template.metric_id: metric or indicator on that symbol
template.value: float or derived from local symbol

multi_leg_condition.label: Multi-Leg Condition (AND/OR tree)
multi_leg_condition.description: Nested boolean tree of conditions with AND/OR logic at each level

template.conditions: array of (condition object or nested multi_leg_condition)
template.min_match: int (default: 0, 0 = all for AND, any for OR)

sequence_condition.label: Bar Sequence / Pattern
sequence_condition.description: Detect a sequence of N bars matching specific per-bar criteria

template.bars: array of bar conditions (each can have OHLC, indicator filters)

band_condition.label: Channel/Band Position
band_condition.description: Price position relative to a band/channel (BB, KC, Donchian)

template.position: enum(below_lower, touch_lower, inside_lower_half, middle, inside_upper_half, touch_upper, above_upper)

momentum_shift.label: Momentum Shift / Acceleration
momentum_shift.description: Detect when momentum changes direction or accelerates

time_filter.label: Time/Date Filter
time_filter.description: Restrict entries to specific times, days, or sessions

template.days_of_week: array[string] (mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun)

volume_confirmation.label: Volume Confirmation
volume_confirmation.description: Require volume spike or above-average volume to confirm signal

template.signal_condition: object (the condition that needs volume confirmation)

atr_trailing_condition.label: ATR Trailing Exit
atr_trailing_condition.description: Exit when price closes below/above ATR-based trailing stop

custom_formula.label: Custom Formula Condition
custom_formula.description: AI-defined boolean expression combining multiple indicators

template.expression: string (boolean expression, e.g. 'rsi(14) < 30 AND sma(20) > sma(50)')
template.variables: array of {name, metric_id, params} (each variable maps to an indicator)

example.expression: rsi_val < 30 AND sma20 > sma50 AND macd_hist > 0

reference_symbol_condition.label: Reference Symbol Condition
reference_symbol_condition.description: Condition computed on a different symbol (e.g., BTC RSI for altcoin entries)

template.condition: object (full condition object to evaluate on reference)
